prompt:

1. Include the word "signal" exactly 3 times.
2. Use between 34 and 48 words in total.
3. Include the word "rocket" exactly 3 times.
4. Do not use the word "garden".
5. No word may start with the letter "B".

Output ONLY the text itself — no preamble, no quotes, no title, no explanation.
